title: Operate two wheel motorbikes
training_package_name: Agriculture, Horticulture and Conservation and Land Management Training Package
competent_person_statement: A competent person in Operate two wheel motorbikes demonstrates consistent performance across all elements and performance criteria in a workplace context.

elements.title: Prepare a two wheel motorbike for operation

pcs.text: Confirm with supervisor activity to be undertaken and that the vehicle is fit for purpose
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Confirm with supervisor activity to be undertaken and that the vehicle is fit for purpose?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Confirm with supervisor activity to be undertaken and that the vehicle is fit for purpose.

pcs.text: Identify potential hazards and risks to self and implement safe working practices to manage risks
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Identify potential hazards and risks to self and implement safe working practices to manage risks?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Identify potential hazards and risks to self and implement safe working practices to manage risks.

pcs.text: Conduct routine pre-operational checks on two wheel motorbike according to operators manual and report faults or malfunctions to supervisor for repair
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Conduct routine pre-operational checks on two wheel motorbike according to operators manual and report faults or malfunctions to supervisor for repair?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Conduct routine pre-operational checks on two wheel motorbike according to operators manual and report faults or malfunctions to supervisor for repair.

pcs.text: Select and maintain personal protective equipment according to workplace safety requirements
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Select and maintain personal protective equipment according to workplace safety requirements?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Select and maintain personal protective equipment according to workplace safety requirements.

pcs.text: Use and fit personal protective equipment, including helmet that is fit for purpose
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Use and fit personal protective equipment, including helmet that is fit for purpose?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Use and fit personal protective equipment, including helmet that is fit for purpose.

pcs.text: Select two wheel motorbike according to rider’s size, skill level and task to be completed
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Select two wheel motorbike according to rider’s size, skill level and task to be completed?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Select two wheel motorbike according to rider’s size, skill level and task to be completed.

pcs.text: Ensure any items that are to be transported on the two wheel motorbike are safely secured
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Ensure any items that are to be transported on the two wheel motorbike are safely secured?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Ensure any items that are to be transported on the two wheel motorbike are safely secured.

pcs.text: Identify and confirm areas and applications excluded to two wheel motorbike operation on the workplace safety plan
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Identify and confirm areas and applications excluded to two wheel motorbike operation on the workplace safety plan?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Identify and confirm areas and applications excluded to two wheel motorbike operation on the workplace safety plan.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E1: Prepare a two wheel motorbike for operation

elements.title: Operate a two wheel motorbike

pcs.text: Start up, steer, manoeuvre, position and stop two wheel motorbike in a controlled manner
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Start up, steer, manoeuvre, position and stop two wheel motorbike in a controlled manner?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Start up, steer, manoeuvre, position and stop two wheel motorbike in a controlled manner.

pcs.text: Comply with legislation and workplace safety plan in regard to carrying passengers
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Comply with legislation and workplace safety plan in regard to carrying passengers?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Comply with legislation and workplace safety plan in regard to carrying passengers.

pcs.text: Identify environmental and biosecurity implications associated with two wheel motorbike operation and minimise impact
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Identify environmental and biosecurity implications associated with two wheel motorbike operation and minimise impact?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Identify environmental and biosecurity implications associated with two wheel motorbike operation and minimise impact.

pcs.text: Identify situations where two wheel motorbike good riding techniques are required
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Identify situations where two wheel motorbike good riding techniques are required?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Identify situations where two wheel motorbike good riding techniques are required.

pcs.text: Apply two wheel motorbike good riding techniques to pre-position the body to assist bike stability
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Apply two wheel motorbike good riding techniques to pre-position the body to assist bike stability?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Apply two wheel motorbike good riding techniques to pre-position the body to assist bike stability.

pcs.text: Identify and avoid riding surfaces, terrain and slopes that are dangerous to safe operation
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Identify and avoid riding surfaces, terrain and slopes that are dangerous to safe operation?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Identify and avoid riding surfaces, terrain and slopes that are dangerous to safe operation.

pcs.text: Operate and manoeuvre over a variety of surfaces, slopes and terrain to minimise risk to safety
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Operate and manoeuvre over a variety of surfaces, slopes and terrain to minimise risk to safety?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Operate and manoeuvre over a variety of surfaces, slopes and terrain to minimise risk to safety.

pcs.text: Modify two wheel motorbike operation according to local weather conditions
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Modify two wheel motorbike operation according to local weather conditions?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Modify two wheel motorbike operation according to local weather conditions.

elements.title: Conduct shut down procedures

pcs.text: Shut down two wheel motorbike

pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Shut down two wheel motorbike.

pcs.text: Identify and report malfunctions, faults, irregular performance or damage to supervisor
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Identify and report malfunctions, faults, irregular performance or damage to supervisor?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Identify and report malfunctions, faults, irregular performance or damage to supervisor.

pcs.text: Store and secure two wheel motorbike
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Store and secure two wheel motorbike?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Store and secure two wheel motorbike.

pcs.text: Remove and store keys in the required location
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Remove and store keys in the required location?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Remove and store keys in the required location.

pcs.text: Unload, load and secure motorbike safely
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Unload, load and secure motorbike safely?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Unload, load and secure motorbike safely.
